title: Better Trial Chambers
description: Mod, that adds more content to newest minecraft Trial Chambers
body:
[Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/lemon_mods)
![Update Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c362cae9f9606fa4a05952e47fc563c6e147ea9.png)
##                      **FORGE 1.19.4 AND 1.20.1       REQUIRED GECKOLIB MOD**
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b93eea85e8758a9fcbe4f65bde4d24cf5c3278f5.png)

This mod was created as a small project but after a while it became big and now there is a lot of new things added. You can explore a new bigger Trial Chambers and fight here mobs or loot unique tressure. You can also find here a new boss and many more.

The mod is not finished yet and is still a work in progress to modify and add new things... 

 

 

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/780c75fd779b628de29080662a2f8190c2ac4a8d.png)

There is a list of all features this mod currently adds:

**Blocks**

- All new minecraft copper blocks
  
- Newest minecraft tuff blocks
  
- Copper Bulbs
  
- Copper Pots
  
- Copper Buttons
  
- Copper Pressurplates
  
- Trial Spawners
  
- Trial Vault
  
- Ominous Trial Spawners
  
- Ominous Trial Enchanter
  
- Heavy Core
  
- Blower
  
- Copper Lock

 

**Entities**

- Breeze
  
- Copper Golem
  
- Tuff Golem
  
- New boss Copper Giant

 

**Items**

- Hammer weapon
  
- Wind Wand weapon
  
- Potion of anty wind
  
- Breeze Rod and Breeze Powder
  
- Trial Key
  
- Ominous Bottle
  
- Ominous Trial Key
  
- New Secret Chamber music disc

 

**And allso better Trial Chamber structure**

 


Mod is only for **FORGE**

Supported versions are: 1.19.4 and 1.20.1

You need to have [**GECKOLIB MOD**](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) instaled!

Issues reports are on external [**GITHUB**](https://github.com/Citronovec/Better-Trial-Chambers-/issues) page

**The mod is still in development!**

[**SUPPORT THE PROJECT HERE**](https://ko-fi.com/lemon_mods)
